rawAssistant: Fresh signs on that one-way road are worth a closer look, but we can't rush in without some context. That local guide you spoke to earlier mentioned some lowland glows not far north - might be connected. Why don't we take a bit of time to analyze what those glow reports mean before deciding where we head?
